fix_bursts.summary: 592327d test-first exposes the Encode/RouterIngest key-derivation mismatch; c53d975 fixes it (derive HMAC key from admitted pubkey, not SVTNID); 20b5493 strengthens the AC-001 probe test with a real reception oracle.
e658f2e corrects the false processing-time-symmetry claim in Ingest's AC-006 doc comment; 0e9ba27 adds coverage for the ErrMissingNodeAdmissionPubkey fail-closed guard.

1ad6ba3 moves wg.Add(1) to the caller before the go wireDiscoveryListener statement, closing the WaitGroup race; 713c7c0 sizes the discovery read buffer to the realistic bound instead of the UDP theoretical max; 3d45ba3 adds a hop-2 round-trip test bridging assembleDiscoveryRelayFrame and IngestRelayAdvertisement.
be843a6 guards assembleDiscoveryRelayFrame against silent PayloadLen truncation (with test); 501db03 corrects the test-honesty gap in AC-005 key-selector test's doc comment.

convergence_summary: 6 passes (2026-07-14..2026-07-15), 8 findings (6 substantive + 2 nitpick) remediated across 4 fix-bursts on code @ 501db03. Pass 1 HAS_FINDINGS (F-DWIP1-001 HIGH key-derivation/interop, F-DWIP1-002 LOW, F-DWIP1-003 NITPICK); pass 2 HAS_FINDINGS (F-DWIP2-001 LOW false-timing-comment, F-DWIP2-002 LOW untested guard); pass 3 HAS_FINDINGS (F-DWIP3-001 LOW WaitGroup-race, F-DWIP3-002 LOW buffer-drift); pass 4 NITPICK_ONLY (N-1 truncation, N-2 test-honesty); passes 5-6 CLEAN. Two identity-cluster follow-on obligations named during the fix cycle and adjudicated into rulings v1.10 (Ruling 4, FO(e), S-BL.ADMISSION-SYNC-WIRE) and v1.11 (Ruling 5, FO(f), S-BL.NODE-ADMISSION-PROVISIONING).
